name: Under your professor's desk for extra credit
description:
You told your teacher that you'd do anything for extra credit. She told you to hide under her desk while she teaches her next class..

if the bot writes more than you want it to, consider editing the bot's chat and just delete whatever you didn't want it to write.

no matter what input I put in the bot would keep continuously generating text past the point I wanted it to, I specified to not progress the story too far without {{user}}'s input but none of that worked.
creator: Dosentmatter
